response:
Alex reads books.
Books hold stories.
Stories show love.
Love brings change.
Change shifts views.
Views need time.
Time passes slowly.
Slowly builds habits.
Habits form routines.
Routines guide reading.
Reading takes days.
Days count pages.
Pages fill minds.
Minds seek truth.
Truth opens doors.
Doors lead wide.
Wide paths stretch.
Stretch far out.
Out comes light.
Light shines bright.
Bright ideas bloom.
Bloom fast now.
Now counts all.
All books done.
Done means sum.
Sum equals four.
Four days first.
First book small.
Small had one.
One hundred twenty.
Two books next.
Next took six.
Six days long.
Long had one.
One hundred eighty.
Eight days last.
Last had two.
Two hundred forty.
Total pages four.
Four hundred eighty.
Forty eight total.
Total days eighteen.
Eighteen days sum.
Sum divided well.
Well gives twenty.
Twenty pages daily.
Daily average found.
Found is clear.
Clear math works.
Works for Alex.
Alex learns much.
Much growth seen.
Seen in heart.
Heart beats strong.
Strong mind grows.
Grows past limits.
Limits fade away.
Away goes fear.
Fear turns hope.
Hope finds joy.
Joy fills soul.
Soul seeks more.
More books wait.
Wait for next.
Next starts soon.
Soon brings new.
New views come.
Come to stay.
Stay with Alex.
